coupled_work_rationale: One owner-ruling recording payload updates decisions, local agent contract, and OSL tracker follow-up beads.

atomicity.message: Atomic docs/tracker owner-ruling recording slice: records D-OSL-7 through D-OSL-10 and D-LEX-8, adds the two repo conduct lines, closes the history-audit bead by ruling, updates preflip/anonymous-verify semantics, and creates two follow-up OSL beads. Corrected staged tracker diff is limited to those five D-OSL/D-LEX records.

conditions.message: The corrected staged docs/tracker payload satisfies the applicable mechanical lint and structural checks.
evidence: go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json returned staged_payload_hash sha256:8e2a0a631f211e7472578e67e8f363da67c185cf396fdb3630b9fe440189ed18 and included only .beads/issues.jsonl, AGENTS.md, and docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md.

jq '{hash:.staged_payload_hash,count:(.packets|length), conditions:[.packets[].condition_id]}' /tmp/whitegorge-dosl-scarletmarsh-packet2.json returned the same hash and count 8 for the assigned conditions.
git diff --cached --check exited 0 with no output.
python3 parsing of the staged blob from git show :.beads/issues.jsonl succeeded with staged_jsonl_valid=true records=180.
br dep cycles returned: No dependency cycles detected.

conditions.message: Governed docs/tracker surface inspected. The staged docs repeat policy only where it has distinct durable roles: decision record plus operative AGENTS rule. The corrected tracker slice is narrow and does not introduce duplicated code, duplicated validation, or parallel implementations.
evidence: `go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json` returned `sha256:8e2a0a631f211e7472578e67e8f363da67c185cf396fdb3630b9fe440189ed18` with exactly `.beads/issues.jsonl`, `AGENTS.md`, and `docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md` hash-included.

`git diff --cached -- AGENTS.md docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md` showed AGENTS adds two concise conduct rules while the docs add D-OSL-7 through D-OSL-10 and D-LEX-8 as durable decisions; that overlap is intentional policy placement, not duplicated implementation logic.
`git diff --cached --stat` showed a small docs/tracker slice: `.beads/issues.jsonl` 8-line delta, `AGENTS.md` 2 additions, and decision doc 87 additions.

conditions.message: The corrected payload records guarded owner decisions and follow-up work without claiming launch, public visibility, history rewrite, completed current-tree scrub, or template propagation. It does not convert a strategic ruling into premature completion evidence.
evidence: `git diff --cached -- docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md` showed D-OSL-7 says the public repo is a fresh initial commit from a future scrubbed tree and explicitly says no visibility changes, public repo creation, or launch execution until owner authorization.

The same diff showed D-OSL-8 keeps private rename/public repo creation behind the hard no-launch gate; D-OSL-10 records fixture-email scrub as current-tree scrub work; D-LEX-8 records the no-development-time-estimates rule.

`git show :.beads/issues.jsonl | jq ...` showed `project-readiness-kit-fysf` and `project-readiness-kit-j0h0` remain open follow-up beads, while `project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557` remains open with those beads added as dependencies.

conditions.message: The staged payload contains no production or test function behavior governed by this condition.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only .beads/issues.jsonl, AGENTS.md, and docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md as modified.
git diff --cached --numstat showed 5/3 for .beads/issues.jsonl, 2/0 for AGENTS.md, and 87/0 for docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md; no source or test files are staged.

conditions.message: The prior DoD blocker is resolved. The corrected staged payload is an atomic docs/tracker decision slice with matching packet hash, passing diff hygiene, active dependency cycle check, and no unrelated COS/IFR2/lexicon tracker catch-up.
evidence: `git diff --cached --name-status` showed exactly three staged files: `.beads/issues.jsonl`, `AGENTS.md`, and `docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md`.

`git diff --cached -- .beads/issues.jsonl | rg '^[-+]\{"id"' | sed ... | sort -u` listed only five changed tracker records: `project-readiness-kit-fysf`, `project-readiness-kit-j0h0`, `project-readiness-kit-osl-audit-history-secrets-8ap`, `project-readiness-kit-osl-flip-anonymous-verify-3ab`, and `project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557`.
`git diff --cached --check` exited 0; `br dep cycles --json` returned `{"cycles":[],"count":0,...}`. No code changed, so Go tests were not required for this docs/tracker-only recheck.

conditions.message: This corrected reply records command-backed evidence bound to packet2 and the current staged hash.
evidence: Agent Mail message 3396 supplied corrected packet /tmp/whitegorge-dosl-scarletmarsh-packet2.json and staged hash sha256:8e2a0a631f211e7472578e67e8f363da67c185cf396fdb3630b9fe440189ed18.

Local jq inspection of packet2 confirmed top-level .staged_payload_hash, .manifest_hash, .staged_payload, and 8 packets for lint-rules, one-function-one-test, evidence-log, destructive-operations, data-integrity, visual-regression, performance-budget, and autonomy-boundary.
This Agent Mail reply includes the concrete commands and observations used for the corrected-hash recheck and cc's RusticDog for audit.

conditions.message: The prior scope blocker is resolved. The corrected `.beads` delta now matches the stated D-OSL-7-10/D-LEX-8 owner-ruling slice: history-audit closure by squash-relaunch decision, anonymous-verification/preflip-gate updates, and two open follow-up beads for current-tree scrub and scaffold conduct propagation.
evidence: Agent Mail 3395 states the corrected tracker blob should contain only five intended records; independent staged diff inspection confirmed exactly those five changed IDs and no COS/IFR2/prior-lexicon tracker transitions.

`git show :.beads/issues.jsonl | jq -c 'select(.id==...)'` showed `project-readiness-kit-osl-audit-history-secrets-8ap` closed by D-OSL-7 squash-relaunch, `project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557` open with `project-readiness-kit-fysf` and `project-readiness-kit-j0h0` added as dependencies, and both new follow-up beads open.
`git diff --cached -- AGENTS.md docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md` showed only the D-OSL-7/8/9/10 and D-LEX-8 decision/config text relevant to this packet.

conditions.message: The staged decisions discuss future launch/rename actions but explicitly keep them behind owner authorization and do not execute or authorize destructive operations now.
evidence: git diff --cached -- AGENTS.md docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md shows D-OSL-7 says it does not authorize visibility changes, public repo creation, or launch execution, and all work remains behind D-OSL-5's hard no-launch gate until owner authorization.

The same staged diff shows D-OSL-8 says the private-repo rename is a flip-time action behind the hard no-launch gate and says not to rename this repository, create the public repository, or change visibility until owner authorization.

A narrow added-line grep over AGENTS.md and docs/decisions for command/destructive patterns including rm -rf, --no-verify, reset --hard, git checkout --, force push, sudo, curl/wget/chmod, token, secret, password, and private key returned no matches.

conditions.message: The corrected staged tracker and decision changes preserve parseability, graph integrity, and the explicit no-history-rewrite boundary.
evidence: python3 comparison of HEAD:.beads/issues.jsonl to staged git show :.beads/issues.jsonl reported staged_jsonl_valid=true records=180 changed_records=5.

The five staged tracker records are project-readiness-kit-fysf, project-readiness-kit-j0h0, project-readiness-kit-osl-audit-history-secrets-8ap, project-readiness-kit-osl-flip-anonymous-verify-3ab, and project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557; these are OSL current-tree scrub/preflip/follow-up records, not unrelated COS/IFR/lexicon catch-up.
br dep cycles returned no dependency cycles after the corrected staged .beads slice.

git diff --cached -- docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md shows D-OSL-7 explicitly says the private repository keeps full history, there is no private-history rewrite, and no historical Burpvalve seal or attestation binding is rewritten.

git config user.name and git config user.email returned clicksopendoors and michael-bltzr@users.noreply.github.com, matching the staged D-OSL-9 implementation requirement. git log --format=%B | rg -n -i 'Co-Authored-By' produced no matches.

conditions.message: Governed launch/privacy/authorship surfaces were inspected and the corrected staged content preserves the boundaries: no visibility flip, no public repo creation, no private-history rewrite, no AI coauthor identity, and fixture-email scrub remains explicit follow-up current-tree scrub work.
evidence: `git grep -n 'visibility\|public repository\|private repository\|hard no-launch\|owner explicitly authorizes\|launch execution' -- AGENTS.md docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md` found the existing hard gate plus new D-OSL-7/8 lines stating no visibility changes/public repo/launch until owner authorization.

`ls -l CLAUDE.md` showed `CLAUDE.md -> AGENTS.md`, and staged `AGENTS.md` records the no-AI-coauthor and no-development-time-or-timeline-estimates conduct rules inherited by the symlinked Claude surface.

`git config --get user.name` and `git config --get user.email` returned `clicksopendoors` and `michael-bltzr@users.noreply.github.com`; `git log --format=%B --all | rg -n 'Co-Authored-By:.*(Codex|Claude|OpenAI|Anthropic|AI)'` returned no matches.

conditions.message: The staged payload contains no UI, screenshot, browser, layout, canvas, or visual asset surface governed by visual regression checks.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only .beads/issues.jsonl, AGENTS.md, and docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md as modified.
backpressure/visual-regression.md governs screenshot, browser, responsive layout, canvas, and visual-diff checks; none of those surfaces are in the staged payload.

conditions.message: The staged payload contains no runtime, benchmark, bundle, throughput, memory, token, or cost surface governed by performance-budget checks.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only docs/tracker files staged and no source/runtime implementation files.
backpressure/performance-budget.md governs latency, memory, token, cost, bundle-size, throughput, and benchmark thresholds; the staged decision and tracker changes do not touch those surfaces.

conditions.message: The staged operating-contract and decision changes tighten agent boundaries and keep launch/rename actions behind explicit owner authorization.
evidence: git diff --cached -- AGENTS.md shows new rules forbidding AI co-authorship trailers and forbidding development time/timeline estimates, instructing agents to describe scope, sequencing, and blockers instead.

git diff --cached -- docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md shows D-OSL-7 and D-OSL-8 both state no visibility change, public repo creation, launch execution, or private-repo rename is authorized until the owner explicitly authorizes the flip.
git diff --cached -- docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md shows D-LEX-8 records the no-estimates rule as an absolute conduct rule to be carried into operating contracts and scaffold templates.
